caption: In an indoor setting with wooden paneling and a backdrop image of solar panels, a woman and a man sit side-by-side at a table, both focused on writing on documents. The woman, on the left, wears a brown leather jacket over a white shirt, while the man, on the right, wears a grey hooded winter coat with a faux-fur collar over a blue and white checkered shirt and glasses. Both individuals are leaning forward, holding pens and filling out papers spread across the table. Throughout the sequence, their movements are minimal; the man continues to write with a blue pen, and the woman remains focused on her paperwork. The scene remains static in terms of composition and location, with no on-screen text or logos visible, capturing a quiet moment of administrative work.
